nodes.label: Belief
nodes.definition: Minimal fixation preserving operation under absent arbitration.

nodes.label: Certainty
nodes.definition: Authority-weighted fixation raising exception re-entry cost.

nodes.label: Absence of Arbitration
nodes.definition: No final arbiter or decisive external agreement is available.

nodes.label: Exception Re-entry
nodes.definition: Ability to reopen and incorporate exceptions.

nodes.label: Closure Risk
nodes.definition: Risk that editability collapses due to high exception re-entry cost.

edges.relation: if too costly, closure risk increases
